source: Everyone points to the spectacular plays , but it 's making the system 's simple , routine plays that puts Smith in elite company . As Tom Brady is fond of saying , good quarterbacking is often as much about minimizing mistakes and making good plays as it is making great ones . " It really goes down to making routine plays , " West Virginia offensive coordinator Shannon Dawson said after the Mountaineers ' 800 yards of offense against Baylor . " You lose sight of that because everything in your mind goes to great plays . " Dawson 's description may sound bizarre , but true excellence is typically banal . Tom Brady and Peyton Manning each mastered the simple things to the point that they could perform them repeatedly , whenever called upon , no matter the situation . Being a quarterback is maybe most of all about making the difficult look routine and , at the college level , Smith is doing just that .  Links
domestication: 每个人都在谈论那些惊人的比赛，但正是那些简单而平常的比赛让史密斯跻身精英之列。汤姆·布雷迪曾经说过，好的四分卫不仅要做出精彩的动作，还要避免错误，完成好基本的动作。这真的就是做好常规动作，西弗吉尼亚大学的进攻协调员香农·道森在山地人队对阵贝勒大学的比赛中取得了800码的进攻之后说。你可能会忽视这一点，因为你的脑海中总是想到那些精彩的动作。道森的话听起来可能有些奇怪，但真正的优秀通常很平凡。汤姆·布雷迪和佩顿·曼宁都已经掌握了简单的事情，以至于他们可以反复地做到，无论什么情况。做一个四分卫也许最重要的是让困难变得平凡，而在大学水平上，史密斯正在做到这一点。
foreignization: 每个人都指着壮观的比赛，但让史密斯与精英球员同列的是那些系统中的简单和常规比赛。就像汤姆·布雷迪经常说的，好的四分卫往往是尽量减少错误并且做出好比赛，这和做出伟大的比赛一样重要。西弗吉尼亚大学的进攻协调员香农·道森在野猫队对阵贝勒大学的800码进攻之后说：“这真的归结到做出常规比赛。你会因为所有事情都在你脑海中变得伟大而忽略这一点。” 道森的描述可能听起来很奇怪，但真正的卓越通常是平凡的。汤姆·布雷迪和佩顿·曼宁都掌握了简单的事情，以至于他们可以反复地做到这一点，无论什么情况，他们都可以做到。做一个四分卫也许最重要的是让困难看起来很常规，在大学层面上，史密斯正做着这一切。 链接

Everyone points to the spectacular plays , but it 's making the system 's simple , routine plays that puts Smith in elite company . As Tom Brady is fond of saying , good quarterbacking is often as much about minimizing mistakes and making good plays as it is making great ones . " It really goes down to making routine plays , " West Virginia offensive coordinator Shannon Dawson said after the Mountaineers ' 800 yards of offense against Baylor . " You lose sight of that because everything in your mind goes to great plays . " Dawson 's description may sound bizarre , but true excellence is typically banal . Tom Brady and Peyton Manning each mastered the simple things to the point that they could perform them repeatedly , whenever called upon , no matter the situation . Being a quarterback is maybe most of all about making the difficult look routine and , at the college level , Smith is doing just that .  Links

source: I majored in American Studies at Notre Dame , as did most of the starting lineup of our legendary football team . ( In retrospect , I suppose that was out of default because the school did n't offer a degree in Criminology . ) Although I received plenty of flack from my friends who were toiling away in their pre-med and mechanical engineering classes while I was working on a multimedia presentation on the Coke vs . Pepsi " cola wars , " I stand by my choice of study . If nothing else , it freed me up to have a spectacular college social life .
domestication: 我在圣母大学主修美国研究专业，和我们传奇足球队的大部分首发球员一样。（回想起来，我觉得那是因为学校没有刑事学专业的缘故。）虽然我的朋友们都埋头苦读着预科医学和机械工程的课程，而我却在忙着制作可口可乐与百事可乐“可乐战争”的多媒体演示，他们还是取笑我说我选的专业不靠谱。但我仍然坚持自己的选择。至少，这让我有机会过上丰富多彩的大学社交生活。

source: The use of salicylic acid ( ASA ) reduces the risk of developing Barrett 's esophagus , which is considered as the main factor affecting the occurrence of esophageal cancer . A study describing the dependence of the ASA use and the development of the Barrett 's esophagus was published in Clinical Gastroenterology and Hepatology , the official journal of the American Gastroenterological Association .
domestication: 咱们先说说为什么要防止食道癌。因为这种病一旦得了，后果非常严重，死亡率也特别高。现在有个好消息，研究发现，每天服用阿司匹林（也就是乙酰水杨酸）可以有效预防食道癌。具体来说，这种方法主要是通过降低巴雷特食道的发病风险来实现的，而巴雷特食道正是食道癌的主要诱因之一。最近有一项相关研究发表在《临床胃肠病学和肝脏病学》杂志上，这也是美国胃肠病学会的官方刊物。
foreignization: 使用乙酰水杨酸（ASA）可以降低患巴雷特食道的风险，而后者被认为是影响食道癌发生的主要因素。一项描述ASA使用与巴雷特食管发展依赖性的研究发表在美国胃肠病学学会的官方期刊临床胃肠病学和肝脏学上。

messages_domestication.content:

source: Look at your lender and discover if there is a software you can use through your phone . Your financial institution must have a free of charge application you can use to keep track of all the dealings you will be making on a daily basis . This is an excellent way to be sure that there exists nothing fishy with bank accounts .

source: " Where do today 's NFL players actually come from ? It 's an empirical question -- one that can be answered with data . To get at it , I turned to Martin Prosperity Institute alumnus and UCLA doctoral student Patrick Adler , who tracked data on the cities and metros of birth for the 1,846 NFL players who were on the preseason rosters for NFL teams during the 2010 season , using team media guides and data on nfl.com .
domestication: 话说今天的NFL球员到底从哪里来的呢？这其实是一个可以通过数据来回答的实证问题。为了弄清楚这个问题，我找来了马丁繁荣研究院的校友、加州大学洛杉矶分校的博士生帕特里克·阿德勒。他通过查看队伍媒体资料和nfl.com上的数据，统计了2010赛季各NFL队预赛名单上1846名球员的出生城市和大都会地区。
foreignization: 今天的NFL球员实际上来自哪里？这是一个经验性的问题——可以用数据来回答这个问题。为了回答这个问题，我求助于马丁繁荣研究所的校友以及加州大学洛杉矶分校的博士生帕特里克·阿德勒，他利用球队媒体指南以及nfl.com上的数据追踪了在2010年赛季NFL球队季前赛名单上的1846名NFL球员的出生城市和大都会区的数据。

source: That 's the linear perspective , but I do n't know that anyone believes that our Father in Heaven is limited by a linear perspective of time . Alma , a Book of Mormon prophet , stated that " all is as one day with God , and time only is measured unto men . " ( Alma 40:8 ) . This can not be a surprising notion even to those who reject the Book of Mormon , given God 's ability to reveal future events to His prophets . If time is irrelevant to God , then He is not limited to a linear chronology . Therefore , from God 's perspective , Jesus always has been and always will be the Christ .
domestication: 按照人类的思考方式，我们可以这样理解：耶稣曾经来过，也会再次回来。但是，这样想的人也清楚，上帝不受我们这种线性思维的限制。摩门经中的先知阿尔玛说过，“对上帝来说，一切就像一天一样，而时间只是人间的衡量标准。”（阿尔玛 40:8）即使不信奉摩门教的人也不会觉得这个观念有什么奇怪，因为上帝可以向先知预言未来的事件。如果时间对上帝来说没有意义，那么上帝也不受线性时间顺序的限制。因此，从上帝的角度来看，耶稣一直都是也是将永远是基督。
foreignization: 那是线性视角，但我不知道是否有人相信我们的天父受限于时间的线性视角。摩门教先知 Alma 表示“对上帝来说，一切都像一天一样，而时间只会被人类衡量。”（Alma 40:8）。鉴于上帝向先知揭示未来的事件的能力，这对于那些拒绝摩门经的人来说也不会是一个惊人的概念。如果时间对上帝来说无关紧要，那么他就不局限于线性时间表。因此，从上帝的视角来看，耶稣始终是并且永远是基督。

source: But here 's the thing : if you know about a comic book character , like a comic book character , and go see a movie based on a comic book character , that makes you ... a geek . If you go see CAPTAIN AMERICA or IRON MAN because you read the comics growing up , you are a geek . source: When one hears of a gathering of celebrities in gowns and tuxedos ; a Grammy-winning legend belting out hits ; a couture designer showing her wares on 5 ' 10 " women who top the scale at 120 lbs ; and an open bar featuring Patron , Patron , and more Patron ; one thing one knows for certain , - you are hearing about a swanky L.A. event . When the story continues that everyone genuinely enjoyed themselves , that the laughs were real , and the kisses actually touched the face of the recipient , one can also easily dismiss the notion that they are hearing about a celebrity award 's event .
domestication: 说到一群穿着礼服和燕尾服的名人聚会，一位格莱美奖获奖传奇人物唱出热门歌曲，一位高级定制设计师在身高5英尺10英寸、体重120磅的模特身上展示她的作品，还有一个提供帕特龙酒、帕特龙酒和更多帕特龙酒的开放酒吧，你可以肯定的一件事就是——你正在听关于一个豪华的洛杉矶活动的故事。当故事继续讲述每个人都真正地享受了自己，那些笑声是真诚的，亲吻确实触及了接受者的脸时，你也可以轻易地排除他们正在谈论的是一个名人颁奖典礼的想法。

When one hears of a gathering of celebrities in gowns and tuxedos ; a Grammy-winning legend belting out hits ; a couture designer showing her wares on 5 ' 10 " women who top the scale at 120 lbs ; and an open bar featuring Patron , Patron , and more Patron ; one thing one knows for certain , - you are hearing about a swanky L.A. event . When the story continues that everyone genuinely enjoyed themselves , that the laughs were real , and the kisses actually touched the face of the recipient , one can also easily dismiss the notion that they are hearing about a celebrity award 's event .

当人们听到聚集了一群穿着晚礼服和燕尾服的名人；一位格莱美奖获奖传奇人物唱出热门歌曲；一位高级定制设计师在一个身高5'10"、体重120磅的女性身上展示她的商品；以及一个提供Patron、Patron和更多Patron的开放式酒吧；有一件事可以肯定的是——你正在听到关于洛杉矶豪华活动的事情。当故事继续讲述，每个人真正地享受了自己，那些笑声是真实的，亲吻实际上触摸到了接受者的脸时，人们也可以轻松地驳斥他们听到的只是一个名人颁奖活动的想法。

source: Metzger will teach an undergraduate course in entrepreneurship in which class members develop a business plan for a local company . The class is part of the Bachelor of Innovation program , a degree in which students take classes in the colleges of Business , Engineering and Applied Science and Letters , Arts and Sciences . His research focus is on the Internet 's influence on industries traditionally dominated by brick-and-mortar retailers and how those retailers changed their business models in response to a new competitive landscape .
domestication: 梅茨格准备开设一门创业课程，让学生们为当地企业制定商业计划。这个课程是创新学士项目的一部分，这个项目的学生需要同时在商学院、工程应用科学学院和文理学院上课。他的研究重点在于互联网对传统零售业的影响，以及这些零售商如何应对新的竞争环境而改变了他们的商业模式。
foreignization: 梅茨格将教授一门创业的本科课程，其中班级成员为当地公司制定业务计划。该课程是创新学士项目的一部分，这是一种学位，学生们在商业学院、工程和应用科学学院以及文学和科学学院学习课程。他的研究重点是互联网对传统上由实体零售商主导的行业的影响以及这些零售商如何在新的竞争格局下改变其商业模式。

source: Further , it 's a real privilege to be able to say you 're getting tired of seeing / reading the *fighting* on the blogs you like to read . People are " fighting " for more than just their personal egos here . It also reflects privilege to find angry voices upsetting and wish them to disappear . It also reflects something I-don't-know-what to use a phrase like " The whole thing seems like the race issue in general . " What does that mean ? It surely does n't just mean who gets offered a writing assignment and who does n't , right ? Just like when we talk about misogyny we are not just talking about who gets offered the job and who gets turned down . We are talking about the root of rape , murder , and a million other manifestations of violence and oppression .
domestication: 说到这里，其实还有一个很重要的问题，那就是有些人觉得自己有资格对某些博客上的争论感到厌烦，他们认为这些争论只关乎个人自尊心的问题。但是实际上，问题的根源远不止于此。有些人可能会因为看到愤怒的声音而感到不安，希望它们消失，这反映出他们自己的特权意识。还有一些人用类似“整个事情就像种族问题一样”的说法，这到底是什么意思呢？难道仅仅是谁能得到写作机会谁不能吗？就像我们讨论性别歧视时，并不是仅仅关注谁能得到工作谁不能，而是深入探讨强奸、谋杀等暴力和压迫行为的根源。
foreignization: 此外，能够说你厌倦在你喜欢阅读的博客上看到/阅读“战斗”，这是一个真正的特权。人们在这里“战斗”的是远不止他们的个人自尊。认为愤怒的声音令人不安，并希望它们消失，这也反映了特权。使用诸如“整个事情看起来像一般的种族问题”这样的短语，也反映了我不知道是什么东西。这难道只是意味着谁被提供写作任务而谁没有吗？就像我们谈论厌女主义时，我们不仅仅是在谈论谁被提供工作而谁被拒绝一样。我们正在谈论强奸、谋杀和其他一百万种暴力和压迫的表现形式的根源。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Further , it 's a real privilege to be able to say you 're getting tired of seeing / reading the *fighting* on the blogs you like to read . People are " fighting " for more than just their personal egos here . It also reflects privilege to find angry voices upsetting and wish them to disappear . It also reflects something I-don't-know-what to use a phrase like " The whole thing seems like the race issue in general . " What does that mean ? It surely does n't just mean who gets offered a writing assignment and who does n't , right ? Just like when we talk about misogyny we are not just talking about who gets offered the job and who gets turned down . We are talking about the root of rape , murder , and a million other manifestations of violence and oppression .

说到这里，其实还有一个很重要的问题，那就是有些人觉得自己有资格对某些博客上的争论感到厌烦，他们认为这些争论只关乎个人自尊心的问题。但是实际上，问题的根源远不止于此。有些人可能会因为看到愤怒的声音而感到不安，希望它们消失，这反映出他们自己的特权意识。还有一些人用类似“整个事情就像种族问题一样”的说法，这到底是什么意思呢？难道仅仅是谁能得到写作机会谁不能吗？就像我们讨论性别歧视时，并不是仅仅关注谁能得到工作谁不能，而是深入探讨强奸、谋杀等暴力和压迫行为的根源。

source: It is one thing to disagree with someone , it is quite another to attack their integrity . This is not the first time that Dr Siegel has been attacked ! The other time I defended him they attempted to get him fired from his job at the Boston University School of Public Health . Again my post at " Ban the Ban " is gone and I ca n't find his post from that period , but it did happen . But to put the good doctors words in perspective .
domestication: 跟人有不同意见是一回事，攻击别人的品格又是另一回事了。这也不是第一次有人攻击西格尔博士了！上一次我还站出来为他辩护呢，他们居然想要让他从波士顿大学公共卫生学院丢掉工作。唉，我之前在“Ban the Ban”的帖子不见了，也找不到他那时候的帖子，但这件事是真的发生过的。只是想澄清一下这位好医生的言论。

source: Autism spectrum disorders are a group of developmental disabilities characterized by deficits in social interactions and communications that influences development into adulthood . The disorders have emerged as a major public health issue in recent years , with the number of children diagnosed with an autism spectrum disorder in the United States is estimated to be 500,000 to 673,000 .
domestication: 自闭症谱系障碍是一种发育障碍，其特点是社交和沟通能力受损，这将影响到成年后的发展。近些年来，这类疾病已经成为公共卫生领域的重要问题。据统计，在美国，有五十万到六十七万儿童被诊断出患有自闭症谱系障碍。
foreignization: 自闭症谱系障碍是一组发育障碍，其特点是社交互动和交流存在缺陷，从而影响到成年后的发展。近年来，自闭症谱系障碍已成为一个主要的公共卫生问题，在美国，有500,000至673,000名儿童被诊断出患有自闭症谱系障碍。

source: Yeah , my big worry is not so much an Oct. surprise , but some big anti-Romney story released the day before , or day off , the election . source: How would you like to use self hypnosis for personal development , weight loss , or to overcome the state of fear itself ? source: But Henry , it is intriguing that you have taken so much effort to combat my side of the debate , while ignoring the wild ideas that J.F.C. has put forth . And many of the claims commonly made about GMO danger are stated as facts , without qualification , even when they are outright false . How many times have you read about tomatoes with fish genes , or the prevalence of terminator technology , or the corn with a scorpion gene ?
domestication: 但是亨利，你却花了这么大的功夫来驳斥我的观点，却完全忽略了J.F.C.提出的那些离谱的想法。这真的很有意思。很多人声称转基因食品有害，但他们往往把这些说法当成事实，而不加任何限定，甚至那些明显错误的说法也不例外。你看过多少次关于把鱼基因植入西红柿、或终止技术的普遍使用、或者加入蝎子基因的玉米的报道呢？这些报道不是已经够多了吗？
foreignization: 但是，亨利，你如此努力地反对我的观点，而忽略了J.F.C.提出的那些离谱的想法，这很有趣。很多关于转基因危险的说法都被当作事实陈述，没有任何限定，即使它们是彻头彻尾的错误。你读到过多多少次关于具有鱼类基因的西红柿、终结者技术的普遍性或者带有蝎子基因的玉米的报道呢？

source: Whenever conservative bloggers try to be clever and " expose " liberal myths , you just know it 's time to pull out the rain coat , ' cause there 's gon na be a whole lot of bullshit flying around . The latest example of this is John Hawkins ' " 20 Obvious Truths That Will Shock Liberals " whose real title should be " 20 Easily Disprovable Stories That Conservatives Chumps Buy Hook , Line &; Sinker . " Let 's take a look shall we ?
domestication: 每当保守派博客试图显得聪明，揭穿所谓的“自由派神话”时，你就知道是时候掏出雨衣了，因为到处都是胡说八道。最新的例子就是约翰·霍金斯的《20个令自由派震惊的显而易见真相》，但它的真实标题应该是《20个轻易被驳斥的故事，保守派笨蛋们却信以为真》。让我们来看看吧。
foreignization: 每当保守派博主尝试变得聪明并“揭露”自由派的神话时，你就会知道是时候拿出雨衣了，因为会有大量的胡说八道在空中飞舞。 这一最新例子是约翰·霍金斯（John Hawkins）的“20个令自由派震惊的显而易见的真相”（"20 Obvious Truths That Will Shock Liberals"），它的真正标题应该是“20个容易被驳斥的故事，这些故事保守派笨蛋们都深信不疑”（"20 Easily Disprovable Stories That Conservatives Chumps Buy Hook, Line &; Sinker"）。让我们来看看，好吗？

source: The organizations are trying to make this food right where it 's used in Haiti , Malawi , Ethiopia , and Niger . They see local production as a way to provide jobs and bring money into impoverished communities . But paying the bill is still a struggle . Even in poor countries , local food often turns out to be more expensive food .
domestication: 这些组织正试图在海地、马拉维、埃塞俄比亚和尼日尔等地就地生产这种食物。他们认为，当地生产是提供工作机会并为贫困社区带来收入的途径。但是，支付费用仍然是一个难题。即使在贫穷的国家，国产食品往往也更贵。这些组织希望通过当地生产来解决这个问题，但这仍然是一个充满挑战的过程。
foreignization: 这些组织正在尝试在海地，马拉维，埃塞俄比亚和尼日尔等地生产这种食物。他们认为，在当地生产是提供工作岗位并向贫困社区带来收入的途径。但是，支付账单仍然是一个挑战，即使在穷国， 当地的食物往往被证明更昂贵。

source: According to a new SurveyUSA poll , a strong majority of King County residents say they will change their behavior to avoid tolls that would range between nothing ( late at night ) to $3.50 ( at rush hour ) on the new SR-520 bridge---including 13 percent of residents who say they 'd actually be willing to move if it meant not paying to cross the bridge between Seattle and Bellevue .
domestication: 根据最新的调查结果，西雅图地区绝大多数居民表示会改变日常出行习惯，以避免在新建的520高速公路桥上缴纳车辆通行费。虽然在深夜时分不需要缴纳任何费用，但在高峰时段的通行费高达每次3.5美元。值得注意的是，有13%的受访者表示，即使需要搬家，他们也宁愿不缴纳这笔费用，以避免在往返西雅图和贝尔维尤的路途中多花一笔钱。
foreignization: 根据 SurveyUSA 的最新民意调查，绝大多数金县居民表示，他们将会改变自己的行为以避免在新的520号州际公路桥上缴纳从（深夜时分）无需缴纳至（高峰时段）每次3.50美元不等的过桥费，其中包括13%的居民，他们表示如果能不用为跨越西雅图和贝尔维尤之间的桥梁而缴纳费用，他们愿意搬迁。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

According to a new SurveyUSA poll , a strong majority of King County residents say they will change their behavior to avoid tolls that would range between nothing ( late at night ) to $3.50 ( at rush hour ) on the new SR-520 bridge---including 13 percent of residents who say they 'd actually be willing to move if it meant not paying to cross the bridge between Seattle and Bellevue .
根据最新的调查结果，西雅图地区绝大多数居民表示会改变日常出行习惯，以避免在新建的520高速公路桥上缴纳车辆通行费。虽然在深夜时分不需要缴纳任何费用，但在高峰时段的通行费高达每次3.5美元。值得注意的是，有13%的受访者表示，即使需要搬家，他们也宁愿不缴纳这笔费用，以避免在往返西雅图和贝尔维尤的路途中多花一笔钱。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

According to a new SurveyUSA poll , a strong majority of King County residents say they will change their behavior to avoid tolls that would range between nothing ( late at night ) to $3.50 ( at rush hour ) on the new SR-520 bridge---including 13 percent of residents who say they 'd actually be willing to move if it meant not paying to cross the bridge between Seattle and Bellevue .
根据 SurveyUSA 的最新民意调查，绝大多数金县居民表示，他们将会改变自己的行为以避免在新的520号州际公路桥上缴纳从（深夜时分）无需缴纳至（高峰时段）每次3.50美元不等的过桥费，其中包括13%的居民，他们表示如果能不用为跨越西雅图和贝尔维尤之间的桥梁而缴纳费用，他们愿意搬迁。

source: Really ? Bigger than the quite obvious link between poor public health practices and stuff like the black death which wiped out a good portion of the European population , or the health catastrophe that destroyed a major nascent civilization when Europeans discovered the Americas ? That 's a pretty bold statement , although perhaps not so much if you 're as ignorant of history as you are of science .
domestication: 真的吗？你说的比公众卫生不良和黑死病之间的关系更明显吗？黑死病曾经消灭了欧洲人口的一大部分。或者说，当欧洲人发现美洲的时候，美洲原住民因为缺乏免疫力而遭受的健康灾难？那是一种相当大胆的说法，虽然如果你对历史了解就像你对科学一样浅薄的话，也许这并不算是什么大事。
foreignization: 真的吗？比起公众健康实践与黑死病之间的关系更明显吗，黑死病消灭了欧洲人口中的大部分，或是当欧洲人发现美洲时，摧毁了一个主要新兴文明的健康灾难？那是一个相当大胆的陈述，尽管如果你和科学一样无知的历史知识，也许这不算什么大事。

source: You missed why YOU should pray for the poor souls . Your MAIN benefit is that if you have to go to Purgatory , for whatever reason and whatever time Our Lord decides , the value of OUR PRAYERS FOR YOU to help you progress through purgatory faster are DIRECTLY related to how you prayed for the poor souls while you were alive .
domestication: 你错过了为什么你应该为可怜的灵魂祈祷的原因。你的主要受益是，如果你不得不去炼狱，无论是什么原因和时间，我们的主决定，你在炼狱中进步的速度与你生前为可怜的灵魂祈祷的程度直接相关。这就像俗话说的“积善之家，必有余庆”。你为他人祈祷，就相当于为自己积累了资粮，以后免受或减轻炼狱的痛苦。所以，你为可怜的灵魂祈祷，其实也是在为自己铺路，希望自己将来能少受些罪。
foreignization: 你错过了为什么你应该为穷苦的灵魂祈祷的原因。你的主要好处是，如果你不得不去炼狱，无论出于什么原因和我们的主决定的时间，**我们为你祈祷**帮助你更快地度过炼狱的价值直接与你在世时为穷苦的灵魂祈祷有关。

source: Petroleum Truth Report , June 4 , 2009 , " A Long Recovery for Natural Gas Price : revisiting the Haynesville Shale " " I now think that the Haynesville Shale reserve estimates that I presented previously were too low . I have evaluated 43 horizontally drilled wells with some production history , and 14 wells with initial production rates only ( Figures 3a and 3b ) . The most-likely average EUR for all operators is 3.6 Bcf per well within a probabilistic range of 2.8-3.6-4.4 Bcf/well . "
domestication: 石油真相报告，二零零九年六月四日，《天然气价格的漫长复苏：重访海恩斯维尔页岩》。我现在认为，我之前提出的海恩斯维尔页岩储量估计太低了。我评估了43口具有生产历史的水平钻井和14口仅有初始生产率的井（图3a和3b）。所有运营商最可能的平均EUR为每口井3.6亿立方英尺，在2.8-3.6-4.4亿立方英尺/口井的概率范围内。这个结果超出了我的预期。

source: James F. Evans says : October 6 , 2010 at 12:44 pm " Two observers moving relative to each other will measure different electric fields . " This is true at all times and for all physical objects . Plasma or not . For plasmas in particular , the electric field they will measure if moving with the plasma is 0 volt/meter .
domestication: 詹姆斯·埃文斯说，两位相对运动的观察者测量到的电场总是不同的，这个规律对所有物理物体都成立，无论是等离子体还是别的什么。特别是，对于等离子体，如果观察者与等离子体一起移动，那么他们测量到的电场就是零伏每米。
foreignization: James F. Evans 说：2010 年 10 月 6 日，下午 12 点 44 分“相对于彼此移动的两个观察者将测量出不同的电场。”这是一个真理，并且适用于所有时间和所有物理物体，无论是等离子体还是非等离子体。特别是，对于等离子体来说，他们如果以等离子体的速度移动，将会测量到的电场是 0伏每米。

source: I think there is a standard for all homes to be filth free and environmentally safe . But , there is a greater assumption that all homes with a woman present will also be orderly , free of clutter , and ready to host a dinner party on a moment 's notice . I 'm not claiming it 's bad or good or that I agree with it , I 'm just stating that our society has a double standard for housekeeping ( and office-keeping , to some extent ) .
domestication: 我觉得每个家庭都应该是干净整洁、环保的，但是在这种前提下，还有一个更深层次的潜规则，那就是只要有女人的家庭，一定会井井有条、一尘不染，而且随时可以接待客人举办晚宴。我并不是说这种想法好也不是坏，也不是在表示赞同或反对，我只是觉得我们的社会对于家务（乃至办公室的维护）存在着双重标准。
foreignization: 我认为所有家庭都应保持干净以及环保是有一定的标准。但是，人们还有一种更深层次的假设，那就是只要有女性在的家庭不仅会干净，而且整洁，没有杂乱，并且随时可以举办晚宴。我并不是说这种想法是好还是坏，也不表明我是否同意这种看法，我只是陈述我们社会对于家务（在某种程度上也是办公室工作）有双重标准这一事实。

I think there is a standard for all homes to be filth free and environmentally safe . I 'm not claiming it 's bad or good or that I agree with it , I 'm just stating that our society has a double standard for housekeeping ( and office-keeping , to some extent ) .

source: Of course . The current drought in the Midwest and the dust storms that it 's produced are reminders of the Dust Bowl and how tenuous our hold is on the land , especially when the rains refuse to fall . We also have climate change , which is magnifying hurricanes like Sandy and also possibly prolonging or lengthening the drought .
domestication: 当然，中西部地区目前的干旱和由此引发的沙尘暴，提醒人们要时刻记得“尘碗时代”，也让我们清楚地认识到人类对这片土地的掌控力是多么脆弱，尤其是在天不下雨的时候。更糟糕的是，全球气候变暖使飓风的强度加剧，比如桑迪飓风，它可能还会加剧干旱，让干旱持续得更久。
foreignization: 当然。中西部地区目前的干旱和由此引发的沙尘暴，都是对尘暴时代的回忆，以及提醒我们与这片土地的联系是如此脆弱，尤其是在雨水拒绝降临的时候。我们还有气候变化，它放大了像桑迪这样的飓风的影响，也可能延长或加剧干旱的时间。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

Of course . source: This is the world we live in . I hate the race card but its played against me often . I 'm stopped if I 'm out late in my own suburban neighborhood . And of course the story is , " we 've had reports a of stolen vehicle matching your description " . Your incident just happened on 9-11 . Mines occur any evening after midnight .  Roberta
domestication: 这就是我们生活的世界，我不想提起种族问题，但它经常被用来针对我。只要我在自己的郊区住宅区晚上外出，就会被拦住。当然，他们的借口总是，“我们接到报告说，有一辆与你描述相符的偷来的车。”你的事件发生在9月11日，而我这样的事件可以在任何晚上发生，只要过了午夜。——罗伯塔
foreignization: 这是我们生活的世界。我讨厌种族卡，但它经常被用来对付我。如果我在晚上在自己的郊区街区外，我就会被拦下。当然，故事是，“我们收到了关于一辆与你描述相符的被盗车辆的报告”。你的事件发生在9-11那天。我的事件发生在每个晚上午夜之后。罗伯塔

source: All are solid spellpower and mana regen buffs . All require a bit of finesse . You may find yourself switching them out from fight to fight pretty regularly . Still , they 're the only new spell you 're getting at max level , and they have the potential to help you greatly if deployed properly . Practice and experiment .
domestication: 这些都是很不错的法术强度和法力恢复的buff，但是它们都需要一些技巧。你可能会发现自己需要根据不同的战斗情况不断切换它们。不过话说回来，这些是你在满级后能学到的新技能，它们有很大的潜力，如果你能正确使用的话。多练习，多尝试，你就会熟悉它们了。
foreignization: 所有这些都是固定的法术强度和法力恢复增益。所有这些都需要一点技巧。你可能会发现自己经常在战斗中切换它们。然而，它们是你在达到最大等级时唯一获得的新法术，如果使用得当，它们有助于你取得巨大的成效。练习和尝试。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

source: Last month , the public advocacy group WISPIRG criticized Walker 's decision to spend billions of state money on four highway construction projects , which were first proposed by Doyle . domestication: 上个月，民间倡导团体WISPIRG批评沃克决定花费数十亿州资金用于四个公路建设项目，这些项目最早是由多伊提出的。尽管州政府面临着36亿美元的预算赤字，地方道路也需要维修，但沃克仍提出将州对公路资本项目的资金增加13%。沃克的这一决定让人费解，很多人都认为他是在“头痛医头，脚痛医脚”，没有从根本上解决问题。另外，人们也质疑这些项目是否真正必要，是否值得投入如此巨大的资金。

source: Ireland was claimed by the Anglo-Normans by 1175 when Henry II was on the throne . Henry 's motivation to claim the island was " to distract from the recent murder of Thomas Becket , Archbishop of Canterbury ; and because the English pope , Hadrian IV , had conferred on him the title ' lord of Ireland ' with the intention that Henry should take control of the island and reform its church , " According to a BBC History article called The Road to Northern Ireland . Early on , total control of Ireland was Britain 's goal .
domestication: 1175年，亨利二世在位时，爱尔兰就被英格兰诺曼人占领了。亨利二世夺取爱尔兰的动机，其实是为了转移人们对最近坎特伯雷大主教托马斯·贝克特被杀的注意力，同时也因为英籍教皇阿德里安四世曾经授予他“爱尔兰领主”的称号，希望亨利二世能控制爱尔兰并改革当地的教会。这是BBC历史网刊《通往北爱尔兰之路》中提到的内容。早期，英国的目标就是完全控制爱尔兰。
foreignization: 爱尔兰岛在1175年亨利二世在位期间被盎格鲁-诺曼人宣称为己有。根据一篇名为通往北爱尔兰之路的BBC历史文章，亨利声称该岛的动机是“为了转移人们对最近谋杀坎特伯雷大主教托马斯·贝克特的注意力；以及因为英格兰教皇阿德里安四世已经将“爱尔兰领主”的头衔授予他，打算让亨利控制该岛并改革其教会”。早期，完全控制爱尔兰就是英国的目标。

source: from an aide to G.W. Bush shared with us by Suskind : " in what we call the reality-based community , " people like you " believe that solutions emerge from your judicious study of discernible reality . " ... " That 's not the way the world empire now , and when we act , we create our own reality . And while you 're studying other new realities , which you can study too , and that 's how things will sort out . We 're history 's actors ... and you , all of you , will be left to just study what we do . " This is the Republican Modus operandi in a nut shell . Romney did n't make hundreds of millions of dollars telling the truth ... he 's a master at the Lie .
domestication: 据萨斯金德分享的乔治·W·布什的一位助手说：“在我们所谓的‘基于现实的社区’，像你这样的人认为，解决方案是从你们审慎研究可辨别的现实中产生的。”……“世界现在不是这样的，当我们采取行动时，我们创造自己的现实。而当你研究其他新的现实时，你也可以研究，这就是事情会如何发展的。我们是历史的演员……而你们所有人，只能研究我们做了什么。”这简明扼要地概括了共和党的行事方式。罗姆尼没有通过说真话赚到数亿美元……他是撒谎的高手。

source: Mitt Romney is Political Tofu . He offers no flavor on his own , but will gladly take on the flavor of the audience in whose company he exists at the moment . Liberal women ? ? Mitt is left of Ted Kennedy . Southern Evangelists ? ? Mitt is severely conservative . .01% Top Tier Earners ? ? Mitt will reduce your contribution to this great nation even further . Which Mitt depends on where he is at any given point in time .
domestication: 米特·罗姆尼就像一块政治豆腐，没有自己的味道，但可以轻松地融入周围人的口味中。当他跟自由派女性在一起时，他比Ted Kennedy还左倾，当他跟南方的福音派教徒在一起时，他又变得非常保守。当他跟收入最高的0.01%的人群在一起时，他会进一步减少他们对这个伟大国家的贡献。哪一个才是真实的米特·罗姆尼？这取决于他在某个特定时间和地点所处的环境。

source: I 'm sure it happens . So ? My brother voted for Obama because he was black and he did n't figure it mattered very much who was president . He wanted a post racial America . I keep hearing how all these voters are voting against " the Black guy " but what about the ones that are just voting for his race ?

source: But still , you should vote . And do it intelligently . Not like I used to do in my high school SBO elections , where I would just do whatever Whitney Donaldson did , cause she was , like , soooo popular , and , like , soooo pretty . Also , do n't do it based on what the TV tells you . I mean , I love TV . She 's my girl . But I know better than to believe everything she tells me . I mean , she told me once I should buy pajama jeans , and I do n't think I need to explain to you how that worked out .
domestication: 尽管如此，你还是应该去投票，而且要明智地投票。不要像我高中时那样随波逐流，只因为当时有个叫惠特尼·唐纳森的同学特别受欢迎，长得也超漂亮，所以我就跟着她投票。也不要光听电视台怎么说，我自己虽然超爱看电视，但也清楚不能把电视说的都当真。我是说，电视还鼓励我买了睡衣裤，结果简直是笑死人……
foreignization: 但是，你仍然应该去投票， 并且要明智地投票。 不要像我过去在高中学生会选举中那样做，我当时只会跟随惠特尼·唐纳德森做的事情，因为她太受欢迎了，太漂亮了。另外，不要根据电视告诉你的内容来投票。 我的意思是，我喜欢看电视。她是我最喜欢的。但是我知道不要相信她说的每一句话。我的意思是，她曾经告诉我应该买睡衣牛仔裤，我不需要解释结果如何。

Also , do n't do it based on what the TV tells you . I mean , I love TV . She 's my girl . But I know better than to believe everything she tells me . I mean , she told me once I should buy pajama jeans , and I do n't think I need to explain to you how that worked out .
但是，你仍然应该去投票， 并且要明智地投票。 不要像我过去在高中学生会选举中那样做，我当时只会跟随惠特尼·唐纳德森做的事情，因为她太受欢迎了，太漂亮了。另外，不要根据电视告诉你的内容来投票。 我的意思是，我喜欢看电视。她是我最喜欢的。但是我知道不要相信她说的每一句话。我的意思是，她曾经告诉我应该买睡衣牛仔裤，我不需要解释结果如何。

source: I 'm a social critic , political/cultural commentator and artist . The modern industrial world is on the cusp of great changes to our current unsustainable way of life . Most people are oblivious to the paradigm shift that will occur , but people are starting to awaken to the fact that the future will not resemble the halcyon days of the last half century in America as evidenced by the OWS movement . My objective is to highlight important news stories and find the truth that is hidden behind what Joe Bageant called the American Hologram. **40;9441;TOOLONG  OWS knows who really pulls the strings
domestication: 我是个社会评论家、政治和文化评论员，也是个艺术家。现代的工业化世界正处在巨变的前夕，我们现有的生活方式已经不可持续。大多数人对即将发生的范式转变浑然不知，但人们开始意识到未来不会像美国过去五十年那么美好，就像占领华尔街运动所表现出来的那样。我的目标是突出重要的新闻故事，并揭露约翰·巴根特所说的“美国全息图”背后的真相。占领华尔街知道谁才是真正掌控一切的人，他们才是幕后黑手。

source: First , although P.B.G.C. reported that its unfunded liability fell from $14 billion to $11 billion last year , this forecast is not as rosy as it seems . The estimated present value of future liabilities dropped only because the agency used a much higher interest rate to discount future payouts . It discounts future payouts using an interest rate linked to corporate bond yields , which jumped in the credit crisis . To economists , it would make more sense to use a slow-moving riskless long-term interest rate to discount future payouts .
domestication: 首先，尽管美国养老保险公司（P.B.G.C.）报告称，其未充分资助负债从140亿美元降至110亿美元，但这个预测并不像看起来那么乐观。未来负债的现值估计之所以下降，只是因为该机构使用了更高的利率来折现未来支出。它使用与企业债券收益率相关的利率来折现未来支出，而在信用危机期间，这个利率大幅上升。在经济学家看来，使用一个行动迟缓的无风险长期利率来折现未来支出会更有意义。换句话说，虽然表面上看起来美国养老保险公司的负债减少了，但实际上这种计算方法并不科学，如果换个角度来算，情况可能就没那么好看了。
foreignization: 首先，尽管P.B.G.C.报告称其未资助负债从140亿美元下降到110亿美元，但这种预测看起来并不那么乐观。未来负债的估计现值仅仅是因为该机构使用了更高的利率来折现未来支出。它使用与企业债券收益率相关的利率来折现未来支出，这在信用危机中飙升。对于经济学家来说，使用一个慢变化的无风险长期利率来折现未来支出来说更有意义。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

First , although P.B.G.C. reported that its unfunded liability fell from $14 billion to $11 billion last year , this forecast is not as rosy as it seems . The estimated present value of future liabilities dropped only because the agency used a much higher interest rate to discount future payouts . It discounts future payouts using an interest rate linked to corporate bond yields , which jumped in the credit crisis . To economists , it would make more sense to use a slow-moving riskless long-term interest rate to discount future payouts .

source: If you are looking for advice in men and women relationships , then you might already be feeling like something is wrong . There 's nothing wrong with seeking help or advice , and rather honestly , it 's the best thing you are able to do to help your men and women relationships improve . It is not only about your partner or spouse either , it can mean assistance with coworkers or relatives , or even your kids . The earlier you go about correcting the problem , the better your chances are of saving the relationships . If your communications with your daughter weaken when she is a teenager , you might think that is a natural part of life , but you do n't wish it to go on when she leaves for college and gets married .
domestication: 如果你在寻找关于男人和女人之间关系的建议，那么你可能已经感觉到有些不对劲了。寻求帮助或建议并没有什么错，老实说，这是你能做的最好的事情，以改善你的关系。不仅仅是关于你的伴侣或配偶，它也可以意味着对同事、亲戚，甚至孩子的帮助。问题越早得到解决，你挽救关系的机会就越大。如果你与女儿的交流在她十几岁时开始恶化，你可能会认为这是生活中自然的一部分，但当她去上大学，结婚后，你就不希望这种情况继续下去了。提早解决问题，才能避免日后遗憾。

source: We 're also looking for tunes that are of the period , but also of the vibe . That can be contemporary folk music or it can be classical music , found tunes or the music of Woody Guthrie . We 're very much open to that . Words are good , and pictures are too . But music is hugely central to who we are and how we work .
domestication: 我们正在寻找那些充满时代气息和情感共鸣的音乐，无论是现代民谣还是古典乐，抑或是伍迪·格思里那样充满社会评论的歌曲，我们都非常欢迎。当然，文字和图片也很重要，但音乐才是我们工作的核心和灵魂。我们希望通过音乐来传达我们的理念和感受，音乐是我们最直接也是最有力的表达方式。所以，如果你有好的音乐推荐或者创作，请尽管与我们分享，我们会很高兴地接受。

source: Heyrich Kalish McGuigan , a Seattle law firm that specializes in litigation against firms responsible for abusive telemarketers and SMS spammers , has filed a class-action lawsuit against Papa John 's Pizza on behalf of customers from all over the US who have received over 500,000 illegal text messages .
domestication: 西雅图的一家叫做Heyrich Kalish McGuigan的律师事务所专门打击那些滥用电话销售和垃圾短信的公司，这家公司最近又立下了新功绩。他们代表来自美国各地的顾客，对派帕约翰披萨店提出了集体诉讼。原来，派帕约翰公司给这些顾客发送了超过五十万条不请自来的短信，而这一行为已经触犯了相关法律。这些顾客现在要求公司为自己的行为承担责任。

source: How do you feel about bloggers asking you for advance readers copies : I 've never had anyone ask me , but it 's simple , if you want ARCS email the publisher or even the author . If someone I know wants and ARC and asks me for advice , I give them a contact . it takes time to build up connections . I have 3 years of experience under my belt .
domestication: 博客作者向你索取预发版书籍，你会有什么感想？老实说，我从没遇到过这种情况，但解决方法其实很简单：如果你想要预发版书，就直接联系出版商或者作者就行了。如果熟人需要预发版书，并且向我寻求建议，我就会给他们提供相关的联系方式。建立人脉网络需要时间，我自己也花了三年才有了现在的基础。

source: Now these loans , unlike charitable gifts , are repaid . This means that , for almost every $25 I loan , I get back $25 . When I lend it again I get back another $25 . This means that as fast as loans are repaid , you can duplicate them . I now have made over 200 loans . A very modest initial effort rolls right along and amounts to something over time .
domestication: 现在这种贷款和慈善捐款不一样，会被还回来。也就是说，我几乎每借出25美元，就能收回25美元。当我再次放贷时，又能收回另外25美元。这意味着，只要贷款被偿还，你就可以不断地重复这个过程。我现在已经贷出了两百多笔贷款。起初看似微不足道的努力，长久以来却成就了不小的成绩。慢慢积累，滴水穿石嘛！

source: Garret Rasmussen ' 74 , a partner with the law firm Orrick , Herrington &; Sutcliffe , sat next to Romney in many of their 1L classes . " He was very earnest and very excited and committed to law school , very much involved in the classes , " he says . source: Some people apparently think she deserved being singled out because she has proven after the fact to be as concerned about skin color as the panicky idiot on the plane who reported her because of her appearance . That 's a lot of crap . We live in a culture that routinely gives credence to citizens who profile based on race . In that way , even though Homeland Security did n't see these 3 people and detain them based on their appearance , they immediately believed a citizen who DID judge them based on appearance alone .
domestication: 有些人似乎认为她被针对是活该，因为事后证明她和那位惊慌失措的白痴一样，仅凭外貌就对人进行评判，这简直是一派胡言。我们生活在一个经常根据种族对待公民的文化里。在这方面，即使国土安全部没有看到这三个人并仅凭外貌拘留他们，但他们立刻相信了一位仅凭外貌做出判断的公民。这其实是典型的“以貌取人”，而且这种想法已经深深影响了我们的生活方式。
foreignization: 有些人显然认为她理应被特别针对，因为在事后被证实，她与在飞机上因为她的外貌而将她报告的惊慌白痴一样关心皮肤颜色。这是一堆废话。我们生活在一个经常让公民根据种族进行特征判断的文化中。在这种方式下，即使国土安全部没有看到这三个人并仅仅根据他们的外貌拘留他们，他们还是立即相信了一位仅凭外貌就对他们做出判断的公民。

source: Clearing to Neutral : From Lifehacker , a post about removing your reasons to procrastinate before even having the need to think of them . I promise it makes sense in the article . I 've done something similar in the past , where , if I have something important to do , I blast through the house and clean everything , rather than doing one chore , sitting down to ' work ' , and thinking of another chore . This article explains how to prep your workspaces in every area of your life .

To have to " deal " with a cold system that frustrates your every move to get something simple accomplished only adds just that special layer of torture designed to test one 's mettle .

source: Based on years of research , Dan Buettner , best-selling author of " The Blue Zones : Lessons in Living Longer from the People Who 've Lived the Longest " ( National Geographic Society , 2008 ) , and two of his colleagues found that the inhabitants of the Greek island of Ikaria were reaching the age of 90 at two and a half times the rate Americans do .
domestication: 著名作家丹·布特纳经过多年的研究发现，希腊伊卡利亚岛的居民比美国人寿命长多了两倍半，很多人都能活到90岁。他把自己的研究成果写成了书《蓝色地带：从最长寿的人群中学习健康长寿的秘诀》，并由国家地理学会在2008年出版。
foreignization: 基于多年的研究，“蓝色区域：从长寿者那里学到关于如何长命百岁的教训”（国家地理学会，2008年）的畅销书作者丹·布特纳和他的两位同事发现，希腊伊卡利亚岛的居民以2.5倍于美国人的速度活到了90岁。

Based on years of research , Dan Buettner , best-selling author of " The Blue Zones : Lessons in Living Longer from the People Who 've Lived the Longest " ( National Geographic Society , 2008 ) , and two of his colleagues found that the inhabitants of the Greek island of Ikaria were reaching the age of 90 at two and a half times the rate Americans do .
著名作家丹·布特纳经过多年的研究发现，希腊伊卡利亚岛的居民比美国人寿命长多了两倍半，很多人都能活到90岁。他把自己的研究成果写成了书《蓝色地带：从最长寿的人群中学习健康长寿的秘诀》，并由国家地理学会在2008年出版。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Based on years of research , Dan Buettner , best-selling author of " The Blue Zones : Lessons in Living Longer from the People Who 've Lived the Longest " ( National Geographic Society , 2008 ) , and two of his colleagues found that the inhabitants of the Greek island of Ikaria were reaching the age of 90 at two and a half times the rate Americans do .
基于多年的研究，“蓝色区域：从长寿者那里学到关于如何长命百岁的教训”（国家地理学会，2008年）的畅销书作者丹·布特纳和他的两位同事发现，希腊伊卡利亚岛的居民以2.5倍于美国人的速度活到了90岁。

source: Good morning , NAACP we certainly thank God for his grace and to our Chair who has called us to be the face of hope our President and CEO who has charged us to remind ourselves that there are more with us than there are against us to all the members of the National Political Action Committee and to all the members of the staff and to our vice chair and this convention chairman

source: 10 years ago social activists across Europe met in Florence , Italy , to oppose neo-liberal policies across Europe , to say no to debt in the global South and to warn that if policies remained in place , Europe would face a crisis in the near future . The European Social Forum was born . Around the same time initiators of the Tax Justice Network were meeting to discuss how to oppose the invidious effects of tax havens and how to bring attention to the corruption and inequality caused when criminals , MNCs and the wealthy are able to live by a different set of rules .
domestication: 十年前，欧洲各地的社会活动人士在意大利佛罗伦萨聚集，反对欧洲的新自由主义政策，拒绝让全球南方背负债务，并警告说，如果这些政策继续实施，欧洲将在不久的将来面临危机。这就是欧洲社会论坛的诞生。同一时期，税务正义网络的发起者们也开始讨论如何反对避税天堂的有害影响，以及如何揭露犯罪分子、跨国公司和富人以特权阶层自居、置法律于不顾而造成的腐败和不平等问题。
foreignization: 十年前，来自欧洲的社会活动家们在意大利佛罗伦萨聚会，反对欧洲各地的新自由主义政策，拒绝南方国家的债务，并警告说，如果这些政策继续执行，欧洲将面临不久将来的危机。于是欧洲社会论坛诞生了。在同一时间，税务正义网络的发起人开会讨论如何反对税收天堂的有害影响，以及如何引起人们对当犯罪者、跨国公司和富人能按照自己的规则生活时产生的腐败和不平等现象的关注。

Translate the following text to Chinese.

10 years ago social activists across Europe met in Florence , Italy , to oppose neo-liberal policies across Europe , to say no to debt in the global South and to warn that if policies remained in place , Europe would face a crisis in the near future . The European Social Forum was born . Around the same time initiators of the Tax Justice Network were meeting to discuss how to oppose the invidious effects of tax havens and how to bring attention to the corruption and inequality caused when criminals , MNCs and the wealthy are able to live by a different set of rules .

source: Cutting tuition growth in half over the next ten years ; recruiting and preparing at least 100,000 new math and science teachers ; A plan to " strengthen public schools in every community , " in part by expanding Race to the Top to school districts Offering states waivers from the mandates of the No Child Left Behind Act ; Using community colleges as economic development engines .
domestication: 十年之内把学费涨幅砍半，这是目标；再招募一批新老师，至少十万名数学和科学老师要有；一个让每个社区都能拥有好学校的计划，其中包括扩大“争先计划”，让更多学校区受益；免除部分州遵守《不让一个孩子落后法案》的强制规定，这也是一个方法；同时还要充分利用社区学院来推动当地经济发展。
foreignization: 在接下来的十年里将学费增长减半；招募和培养至少10万名新的数学和科学教师；一项“加强每个社区的公立学校”的计划，部分是通过将“竞相出彩”扩展到学区，为州提供豁免《不让一个孩子落后法案》要求的豁免权；利用社区学院作为经济发展引擎。

source: Unfortunately , health issues do come up often with African cichlids , making it a very important piece of information to take into consideration before bringing one of these fish home . The owner should be able to recognize signs of illness like loss of appetite , erratic swimming patterns , frayed fins , and an assortment of other external or behavioral abnormalities . All of these symptoms mean that the fish is ill and needs help . To nurse the fish back to health , immediately improve the water quality and quarantine them until they are healed . If matters get too bad , call the local fish doctor .
domestication: 不过说实话，非洲鲷鱼容易生病，这是你在决定带一条回家之前必须考虑的一个问题。作为鱼主，你得学会判断鱼是否生病，比如鱼儿不爱吃东西、游来游去的没有规律、尾巴磨损或者其他奇怪的行为。这些症状都说明你的鱼儿需要帮助了。这时候，你应该马上改善水质并且把生病的鱼单独养着，直到它们恢复健康。如果情况太严重了，那就只能请当地的“水生动物医生”出马了。
foreignization: 不幸的是，非洲慈鲷经常出现健康问题，因此，在将其中一条鱼带回家之前，这是一个非常重要的考虑因素。主人应该能够认识到失去食欲、游泳模式异常、鳍毛磨损以及其他各种外部或行为异常等疾病迹象。所有这些症状都意味着这条鱼生病了，需要帮助。为了让鱼恢复健康，立即改善水质，并在它们康复之前隔离它们。如果情况变得太糟糕，请打电话给当地的鱼类医生。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Unfortunately , health issues do come up often with African cichlids , making it a very important piece of information to take into consideration before bringing one of these fish home . The owner should be able to recognize signs of illness like loss of appetite , erratic swimming patterns , frayed fins , and an assortment of other external or behavioral abnormalities . All of these symptoms mean that the fish is ill and needs help . To nurse the fish back to health , immediately improve the water quality and quarantine them until they are healed . If matters get too bad , call the local fish doctor .
不过说实话，非洲鲷鱼容易生病，这是你在决定带一条回家之前必须考虑的一个问题。作为鱼主，你得学会判断鱼是否生病，比如鱼儿不爱吃东西、游来游去的没有规律、尾巴磨损或者其他奇怪的行为。这些症状都说明你的鱼儿需要帮助了。这时候，你应该马上改善水质并且把生病的鱼单独养着，直到它们恢复健康。如果情况太严重了，那就只能请当地的“水生动物医生”出马了。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Unfortunately , health issues do come up often with African cichlids , making it a very important piece of information to take into consideration before bringing one of these fish home . The owner should be able to recognize signs of illness like loss of appetite , erratic swimming patterns , frayed fins , and an assortment of other external or behavioral abnormalities . All of these symptoms mean that the fish is ill and needs help . To nurse the fish back to health , immediately improve the water quality and quarantine them until they are healed . If matters get too bad , call the local fish doctor .
不幸的是，非洲慈鲷经常出现健康问题，因此，在将其中一条鱼带回家之前，这是一个非常重要的考虑因素。主人应该能够认识到失去食欲、游泳模式异常、鳍毛磨损以及其他各种外部或行为异常等疾病迹象。所有这些症状都意味着这条鱼生病了，需要帮助。为了让鱼恢复健康，立即改善水质，并在它们康复之前隔离它们。如果情况变得太糟糕，请打电话给当地的鱼类医生。

source: As a national speaker I have presented to hundreds of family caregivers throughout the country . In each presentation I highlight how , as caregivers , we can become task masters ; focused on our to-do list more than the people around us . I share this with caregivers because I realized in looking back over the time I cared for my grandfather , that the pattern happened so seamlessly that it was n't until years later that I realized that I was so focused on what needed to be done , that I missed opportunities to just spend time with him as his granddaughter .
domestication: 作为一名全国性的演讲者，我曾在全国各地与数百位家庭护理人员分享过经验。在每一次演讲中，我都会强调我们作为护理人员，如何容易变成任务的奴隶，更加关注待办事项清单，而不是身边的人。我与护理人员分享这些，是因为回顾我照顾祖父的那段时间，我意识到这种模式发生得如此自然，以至于直到很多年后，我才意识到自己当时太专注于需要做的事情，以至于错过了和祖父作为孙女共度时光的机会。这种感觉就像我们常说的“不见花开不见花落”，在照顾亲人的过程中，我们可能会忽略了和他们相处的美好时光，反而陷入忙碌的日常琐事中。
foreignization: 作为全国性演讲者，我曾向全国数百名家庭护理人员发表过演讲。在每次演讲中，我都会强调，我们作为护理人员，如何成为任务大师；专注于我们的待办事项清单，而不是周围的人。我与护理人员分享这些，是因为我在回顾我照顾祖父的时间时意识到，这种模式发生得如此无缝，以至于直到多年后，我才意识到我太专注于需要做的事情，以至于我错过了只是作为他的孙女和他一起度过时间的机会。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

As a national speaker I have presented to hundreds of family caregivers throughout the country . In each presentation I highlight how , as caregivers , we can become task masters ; focused on our to-do list more than the people around us . I share this with caregivers because I realized in looking back over the time I cared for my grandfather , that the pattern happened so seamlessly that it was n't until years later that I realized that I was so focused on what needed to be done , that I missed opportunities to just spend time with him as his granddaughter .

作为一名全国性的演讲者，我曾在全国各地与数百位家庭护理人员分享过经验。在每一次演讲中，我都会强调我们作为护理人员，如何容易变成任务的奴隶，更加关注待办事项清单，而不是身边的人。我与护理人员分享这些，是因为回顾我照顾祖父的那段时间，我意识到这种模式发生得如此自然，以至于直到很多年后，我才意识到自己当时太专注于需要做的事情，以至于错过了和祖父作为孙女共度时光的机会。这种感觉就像我们常说的“不见花开不见花落”，在照顾亲人的过程中，我们可能会忽略了和他们相处的美好时光，反而陷入忙碌的日常琐事中。

source: Once these tools were in place , the reports of leaky add-ons started rolling in , and it only took a few months to realize the magnitude of the problems they were causing . We started tracking them , we helped authors fix them , and tightened the AMO review guidelines so that any add-on that was found to cause zombie compartments would have its status downgraded .
domestication: 一旦这些工具就绪，我们开始不断收到有关泄漏插件的报告，只用了几个月的时间，我们就意识到了这些问题的严重性。我们开始追踪它们，帮助开发者修复漏洞，并且加强了AMO审查指南，以便一旦发现任何插件会导致僵尸程序，就会降低其状态等级。现在，这些措施已经取得了一定的成效，僵尸程序变得不那么普遍了。

source: For the next 8 years we were periodically visited by social workers who did n't really believe that a man and two kids could keep a house ( this was the mid-1960s . ) We could . We quickly figured out that if we kept things picked up and did a little dusting and sweeping every afternoon our house could be as tidy ( if not tidier ) than everyone else 's .

source: By the 18 th century , Irish patriotism started to flare as the Irish Catholics still had limited rights . Thoughts of revolution and independence were mirrored in France and America while they carried their own revolutions . The Orange Order resulted after the Battle of the Diamond in 1795 , which was a fight between Protestants and Catholics . Today , the Orange Order is still well known for its Unionist influence and defending its culture .
domestication: 到了18世纪，爱尔兰人的爱国情绪开始高涨，因为天主教徒仍然被剥夺了很多权利。在法国和美国掀起革命的同时，爱尔兰人也开始思考革命和独立的问题。1795年的钻石山战役，是新教徒和天主教徒之间的一场冲突，最终导致了奥伦治兄弟会的成立。时至今日，奥伦治兄弟会仍以其强烈的联邦主义倾向和对自己文化的坚定保护而闻名。他们每年都举行盛大的游行活动来庆祝自己的历史和传统，虽然这些活动有时也会引发宗派之间的紧张气氛。尽管如此，奥伦治兄弟会仍是爱尔兰文化中一个重要的组成部分，他们的影响力不可忽视。
foreignization: 到18世纪时，爱尔兰民族主义情绪开始高涨，因为当时的爱尔兰天主教徒权利仍受限制。当法国和美国发生革命时，爱尔兰人也产生了革命和独立的想法。1795年发生的钻石战役是一场新教徒与天主教徒之间的斗争，而奥伦治联谊会正是在此之后出现的。如今，奥伦治联谊会仍以其联邦主义影响力以及捍卫其文化而闻名。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

By the 18 th century , Irish patriotism started to flare as the Irish Catholics still had limited rights . Thoughts of revolution and independence were mirrored in France and America while they carried their own revolutions . The Orange Order resulted after the Battle of the Diamond in 1795 , which was a fight between Protestants and Catholics . Today , the Orange Order is still well known for its Unionist influence and defending its culture .

到了18世纪，爱尔兰人的爱国情绪开始高涨，因为天主教徒仍然被剥夺了很多权利。在法国和美国掀起革命的同时，爱尔兰人也开始思考革命和独立的问题。1795年的钻石山战役，是新教徒和天主教徒之间的一场冲突，最终导致了奥伦治兄弟会的成立。时至今日，奥伦治兄弟会仍以其强烈的联邦主义倾向和对自己文化的坚定保护而闻名。他们每年都举行盛大的游行活动来庆祝自己的历史和传统，虽然这些活动有时也会引发宗派之间的紧张气氛。尽管如此，奥伦治兄弟会仍是爱尔兰文化中一个重要的组成部分，他们的影响力不可忽视。

source: It 's so cool that Michelle Obama is getting involved in the Olympics and teaching kids to eat healthy and get fit ! source: Last week Spring Term ended sending off 28 students of mine , who I now hope will spend quality time pondering advertising , apps , websites , user experience , digital products , mobile , designing for small screens and , most importantly , how the web and mobile are their own thing , in an entirely new light .

source: " In today 's world it 's a known fact that Scientist clamor for funding as well as recognition . Both of those come in their greatest form from Governments and big , BIG , business . This brings us to something Steve Savage wrote at the opening of the main article : " every significant panel of scientists that has reviewed this technology has concluded that it is as safe as any other domesticated food crop . " . This is as naive as claiming that McDonalds food is healthy because the company 's spokesman said so . "
domestication: 在当今世界，这是个众所周知的事实：科学家们不断为自己的研究争取资金和认可，而这些最主要的来源就是政府和那些大企业。因此，就像Steve Savage在文章开头所写的那样：“每一个重大的科学家小组都对这项技术进行了审查，并得出结论，它和其他任何家养食品一样安全。” 这话就像说麦当劳的食物健康，只因为公司发言人这么说一样天真。毕竟，谁为研究提供经费，研究结果往往就偏向于谁。
foreignization: 在今天的世界里，这是一个众所周知的事实，科学家们要求资金和认可。其中两个都以最大形式来自政府和大型企业。这使我们想起了史蒂夫·萨维奇（Steve Savage）在主文章开头写的一段话：“每个审查过这项技术的重要科学家小组都得出结论：它与其他任何驯化食品作物一样安全。”这和声称麦当劳的食物是健康的，因为公司发言人这么说的理由一样天真。

source: It happens to all of us , and we all feel like idiots after the fact because sometimes the concept of this nature is truly so simple that anyone really could have thought of it . This is why the only difference between you and the person that did think of it is the boundaries you place on yourself that prevent you from being as open minded and creative as the product 's inventor .
domestication: 这种事经常发生在我们身上，事后回想，我们会觉得自己当时太傻了，因为有些想法实在太简单了，谁都可能想到。其实，你和那个想出来的人并没有什么不同，只是你自己给自己设定了太多的限制，没能像发明者那样豁然开朗，想到那么一个新颖的点子。
foreignization: 这件事发生在我们每个人身上，我们事后都会觉得自己很傻，因为有时候这种性质的概念确实如此简单，以至于任何人都能想到。但这就是你和想到它的人之间的唯一区别，即你给自己设定的界限，阻止你像产品发明者一样开放心态和富有创造力。

source: Montreal will pass a battered Ottawa Senators . Daniel Alfredsson , who was playing phenomenal hockey and had surged into the scoring lead briefly , has been bothered by a hip flexor and the Senators will not rush him back . Dany Heatley has been out with a separated shoulder . Their goaltending tandem of Martin Gerber and Ray Emery has been the source of much drama as Emery has not taken well to a secondary role . Meanwhile , Cristobal Huet has been quietly sensational in goal for Montreal . His save percentage is .924 and his goals against 2.30 . The Canadiens have become balanced and are ready to capitalize on the Senators ' misfortune .
domestication: 蒙特利尔要越过一蹶不振的渥太华参议员队了，当时丹尼尔·阿尔弗雷德森打得非常出色，一度冲到了进球榜首位，但他一直被髋屈肌的问题困扰，渥太华不会急着让他回归比赛。丹尼·希特利因为肩膀脱臼而缺席比赛，他们的守门员马丁·杰伯和雷·埃梅里之间的竞争也成为了一出戏剧，埃梅里无法接受次要角色。与此同时，蒙特利尔的守门员克里斯托巴尔·霍耶特却默默地做出惊人的表现，他的救球率是0.924，失球数为2.30个。加拿大人队已经变得均衡，准备好趁着渥太华的不幸而起飞了。
foreignization: 蒙特利尔将超越受伤的渥太华参议员队。丹尼尔·阿尔弗雷森（Daniel Alfredsson）一直打出非常好的表现，并且一度登上了得分榜首位，但他最近被髋屈肌的问题困扰，参议员队不会急着让他复出。达尼·希特利（Dany Heatley）因为肩膀脱位而缺阵。他们的守门员组合马丁·盖伯（Martin Gerber）和雷·埃默里（Ray Emery）一直是许多戏剧性事件的源头，因为埃默里无法适应次要角色。与此同时，克里斯托巴尔·乌耶（Cristobal Huet）在蒙特利尔的守门表现却异常出色。他的扑救率是0.924，他的失球率是2.30。加拿大人队已经变得平衡，他们准备好趁着参议员队的不幸而获利。

source: The so-called shale gas revolution promises E &P; opportunities that are geographically immense with no barriers to entry . These ventures supposedly have no risk . Because of shale plays , we are told that there will be an abundant supply of inexpensive gas for 100 years . And the E &P; companies involved will all earn big profits . Is there precedent for this improbable combination of make-believe business assumptions that did not end in disappointment ?
domestication: 他们口中的页岩气革命承诺了无边界的勘探和生产机会，而且听起来简直就是一场没有任何风险的游戏。因为有页岩气的出现，我们被告知未来100年里，廉价的天然气将源源不断。而且参与其中的公司也将赚得盆满钵满。但是，这种好得不像真的商业前景，历史上有没有先例呢？这种不切实际的组合难道不会最终让人大失所望吗？
foreignization: 所谓的页岩气革命承诺了巨大的E＆P机会，地理范围广阔，没有进入壁垒。据称，这些项目没有风险。由于页岩气田，我们被告知未来100年将有大量廉价的天然气供应。并且参与其中的E＆P公司都将获得巨额利润。是否有先例表明这种不太可能的商业假设组合不会以失望告终？

messages_domestication.content:

The so-called shale gas revolution promises E &P; opportunities that are geographically immense with no barriers to entry . These ventures supposedly have no risk . Because of shale plays , we are told that there will be an abundant supply of inexpensive gas for 100 years . And the E &P; companies involved will all earn big profits . Is there precedent for this improbable combination of make-believe business assumptions that did not end in disappointment ?

source: The female agent returned to my cell with my cell phone . She wanted me to show her my tweets -- that were simultaneously posted onto Facebook -- I had composed while on the plane . She joked that she did n't even have a Facebook account . She left for a few minutes then returned and allowed me to call my husband . She said I would be released in a few minutes .

source: Honestly , I would like to see a study of how many young children are injured , killed , lost , etc. after a decision to NOT leave them alone in the car during a short errand . It seems imperative to take both sides into account when society decides that leaving kids in cars should not be allowed .
domestication: 说实话，我倒是很想看看有没有研究统计过，父母在短时间内不离开孩子在车里，到底会对孩子造成什么样的伤害。好像每当这种事情发生时，我们总是只看到一方面的后果，却从不考虑到，父母把孩子单独留在车里，其实也是出于无奈。所以，当社会决定禁止把孩子留在车里时，也应该考虑到父母的难处，而不是简单地下一个禁令。
foreignization: 老实说，我想看到一个关于在决定不让年幼的孩子单独留在车里做一件短暂的事之后，有多少孩子受伤、被杀害、丢失等等的研究。在社会决定不应该让孩子留在车里时，考虑两方面的因素似乎是至关重要的。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Honestly , I would like to see a study of how many young children are injured , killed , lost , etc. after a decision to NOT leave them alone in the car during a short errand . It seems imperative to take both sides into account when society decides that leaving kids in cars should not be allowed .
说实话，我倒是很想看看有没有研究统计过，父母在短时间内不离开孩子在车里，到底会对孩子造成什么样的伤害。好像每当这种事情发生时，我们总是只看到一方面的后果，却从不考虑到，父母把孩子单独留在车里，其实也是出于无奈。所以，当社会决定禁止把孩子留在车里时，也应该考虑到父母的难处，而不是简单地下一个禁令。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Honestly , I would like to see a study of how many young children are injured , killed , lost , etc. after a decision to NOT leave them alone in the car during a short errand . It seems imperative to take both sides into account when society decides that leaving kids in cars should not be allowed .
老实说，我想看到一个关于在决定不让年幼的孩子单独留在车里做一件短暂的事之后，有多少孩子受伤、被杀害、丢失等等的研究。在社会决定不应该让孩子留在车里时，考虑两方面的因素似乎是至关重要的。

source: Obama selected : Timothy Geithner , the current head of the New York Fed , as treasury secretary ; Larry Summers , a former treasury secretary under President Bill Clinton , as director of Obama 's National Economic Council ; Christina Romer , a professor of economics at the University of California at Berkeley , as chair of the White House Council of Economic Advisers ; and Melody Barnes , a former chief counsel to Sen. Ted Kennedy and executive vice president for policy at the liberal Center for American Progress , as Director of the Domestic Policy Council .
domestication: 奥巴马选择了现任纽约联储主席蒂莫西·盖特纳担任财政部长；克林顿总统任期内的前任财政部长拉里·萨默斯担任国家经济委员会主任；加州大学伯克利分校的经济学教授克里斯蒂娜·罗默担任白宫经济顾问委员会主席；泰德·肯尼迪参议员的前首席法律顾问，自由派智库美国进步中心政策执行副总裁梅洛迪·巴恩斯担任国内政策委员会主任。
foreignization: 奥巴马选择：纽约联储现任主席蒂莫西·盖特纳担任财政部长；前克林顿总统下的财政部长拉里·萨默斯担任国家经济委员会主任；加州大学伯克利分校的经济学教授克里斯蒂娜·罗默担任白宫经济顾问委员会主席；以及曾担任参议员泰德·肯尼迪的首席法律顾问和自由派智库美国进步中心的政策执行副总裁的梅洛迪·巴恩斯担任国内政策委员会主任。

Obama selected : Timothy Geithner , the current head of the New York Fed , as treasury secretary ; Larry Summers , a former treasury secretary under President Bill Clinton , as director of Obama 's National Economic Council ; Christina Romer , a professor of economics at the University of California at Berkeley , as chair of the White House Council of Economic Advisers ; and Melody Barnes , a former chief counsel to Sen. Ted Kennedy and executive vice president for policy at the liberal Center for American Progress , as Director of the Domestic Policy Council .
奥巴马选择了现任纽约联储主席蒂莫西·盖特纳担任财政部长；克林顿总统任期内的前任财政部长拉里·萨默斯担任国家经济委员会主任；加州大学伯克利分校的经济学教授克里斯蒂娜·罗默担任白宫经济顾问委员会主席；泰德·肯尼迪参议员的前首席法律顾问，自由派智库美国进步中心政策执行副总裁梅洛迪·巴恩斯担任国内政策委员会主任。

source: I quit swimming for good when I was 16 , after nearly a decade of intense training . Toward the end , I swam thousands of yards a dayand had massages from the team trainer before and after practice to manage the chronic tension problems in my shoulders . I swam next to swimmers who qualified for nationals , for the olympics trials . I was always in lane 1 , the injured lane , humiliation alley .
domestication: 我十六岁那年就彻底告别了游泳，在之前的近十年里，我一直在刻苦训练。到后来，我每天都要游上几千码，还要在练习前后接受队里的按摩师按摩，以缓解肩膀的慢性紧张问题。我和那些能够代表国家比赛、甚至参加奥运会选拔赛的选手一起训练。但是我总是被分到第一条泳道，也就是所谓的“伤员专区”，更有意思的名字叫“丢人沟”。
foreignization: 我16岁时彻底停止了游泳，此前我已经进行了近十年的紧张训练。在那段时间快结束的时候，每天我都会游上几千码，并且在练习前后会接受队伍教练的按摩，以应对我肩膀的慢性紧张问题。我与那些获得全国比赛资格、奥运会试训资格的游泳运动员并肩而游。我总是呆在第一泳道，受伤者专用泳道，屈辱之路。

source: When we get to the farm , we walk right into the middle of a peanut-harvesting party . I see big piles of peanut plants , just pulled from the earth . Men and women are sitting beside them , picking peanuts off the roots and dropping them into buckets . The women are singing ; young men are playing wooden flutes .
domestication: 我们一到农场，就撞进了一个花生收获的欢乐会。眼前是一片忙碌的景象，有大堆刚刚从地下挖出的花生植物，男人和女人坐在旁边，拽着根部摘下花生，然后丢进篮子里。女人们唱歌，年轻人吹着木制笛子，整个气氛非常热闹。

source: What followed was a 31-year career as an actor , producer , director , stage manager , lighting director and set designer , mostly off-Broadway , working on productions that launched or advanced the careers of Peter Falk , Van Heflin , Linda Darnell , Rita Moreno , Barbra Streisand and many others .

source: I 've made a couple of posts about DJ Earworm and do like his stuff a lot ( especially this fantastic track : If I Were A Free-Fallin ' Boy , ) but his last couple of United States of Pop remixes were a bit too heavily autotuned for my taste . One of the things I like about these is the autotuning is harder to detect . posted by zarq at 2:53 PM on November 17
domestication: 我之前也发过几篇关于DJ Earworm的帖子，我确实很喜欢他的作品（尤其是那首棒极了的曲子《If I Were A Free-Fallin' Boy》），但他最近的几部《美国流行音乐大杂烩》混音作品的自动调音效果有点过头了。我喜欢这些曲子的一个原因就是自动调音的痕迹比较难被察觉。--zarq 于11月17日下午2点53分发帖。

source: I 've always through that AC-130 's should get lighter , better weapons , radar absorbent materials ( if they do n't already ) and enhanced optics &; targeting equipment to make them more effective regardless of weather ( can not think of a way to have them operate in daylight except if 100% certain all AA weapons nuetralized ) and that A-10s should be networked to make them even more effective at the brilliant job they already do . Neutralize the AA and use the 22 's to maintain air superiority , and let the ACs and A-10s wreak holy hell on the enemy . Booyah .
domestication: 我一直觉得AC-130应该配备更轻便、更好的武器、雷达吸收材料（如果它们还没有的话）和更先进的光学设备和瞄准系统，这样无论在什么天气条件下都能发挥出更大的作用（除了百分之百确认所有高射炮都被摧毁，否则根本没办法让它们在白天行动）。同时，我认为A-10攻击机应该联网协同作战，这样才能让它们在已经很出色的工作基础上变得更加有效。首先消灭敌人的防空力量，然后用F-22战斗机来维持空中优势，最后让AC-130和A-10大肆破坏敌人的阵地。太棒了！

source: Needless to say , I 've pretty much given up on expecting any help from him with any housework . Forget cooking , too , as I do all of that . One thing I really find curious is that both of my husband 's brothers are good cooks and they are willing to pitch right in and cook any day of the week , even after a long day at work . " How did that ' cooking gene ' pass you by ? " I always ask my husband . So , yeah , the differing expectations for men and women are alive and well in our house , although I think my husband is the one who is mystified over my relative lack of guilt over being ' a good housekeeper . '
domestication: 我已经习惯了不指望他帮忙做家务，这是理所当然的。更别提做饭了，因为这些事都是我在做。有一点让我觉得很有趣的是，我丈夫的两个哥哥都是好厨师，他们随时都愿意帮忙做饭，即使是在工作了一整天之后。我常常问我丈夫：“你怎么没有继承到这个‘做饭的基因’呢？”所以，是的，我们家的男人和女人对待家务的期望还是有所不同的，不过我觉得我丈夫才是真正感到困惑的人，他不明白为什么我不会因为不是一个“好主妇”而感到愧疚。事实上，我觉得自己已经很尽责了，没必要再感到有什么不对劲。
foreignization: 不用说，我基本上已经放弃了指望他帮忙做家务的念头。忘记做饭吧，因为我包办了一切。有一件事我真的很好奇，那就是我丈夫的两个兄弟都是好厨师，他们很乐意在任何一天，哪怕在工作了一整天之后，也会主动帮忙做饭。我总是问我的丈夫：“你怎么没有继承那个‘烹饪基因’？”所以，是的，在我们家里，对男人和女人不同的期望仍然存在，尽管我认为我的丈夫才是真正感到困惑的人，因为我相对来说不觉得自己有多少做个“好家庭主妇”的愧疚感。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Needless to say , I 've pretty much given up on expecting any help from him with any housework . Forget cooking , too , as I do all of that . One thing I really find curious is that both of my husband 's brothers are good cooks and they are willing to pitch right in and cook any day of the week , even after a long day at work . " How did that ' cooking gene ' pass you by ? " I always ask my husband . So , yeah , the differing expectations for men and women are alive and well in our house , although I think my husband is the one who is mystified over my relative lack of guilt over being ' a good housekeeper . '

我已经习惯了不指望他帮忙做家务，这是理所当然的。更别提做饭了，因为这些事都是我在做。有一点让我觉得很有趣的是，我丈夫的两个哥哥都是好厨师，他们随时都愿意帮忙做饭，即使是在工作了一整天之后。我常常问我丈夫：“你怎么没有继承到这个‘做饭的基因’呢？”所以，是的，我们家的男人和女人对待家务的期望还是有所不同的，不过我觉得我丈夫才是真正感到困惑的人，他不明白为什么我不会因为不是一个“好主妇”而感到愧疚。事实上，我觉得自己已经很尽责了，没必要再感到有什么不对劲。

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Needless to say , I 've pretty much given up on expecting any help from him with any housework . Forget cooking , too , as I do all of that . One thing I really find curious is that both of my husband 's brothers are good cooks and they are willing to pitch right in and cook any day of the week , even after a long day at work . " How did that ' cooking gene ' pass you by ? " I always ask my husband . So , yeah , the differing expectations for men and women are alive and well in our house , although I think my husband is the one who is mystified over my relative lack of guilt over being ' a good housekeeper . '

不用说，我基本上已经放弃了指望他帮忙做家务的念头。忘记做饭吧，因为我包办了一切。有一件事我真的很好奇，那就是我丈夫的两个兄弟都是好厨师，他们很乐意在任何一天，哪怕在工作了一整天之后，也会主动帮忙做饭。我总是问我的丈夫：“你怎么没有继承那个‘烹饪基因’？”所以，是的，在我们家里，对男人和女人不同的期望仍然存在，尽管我认为我的丈夫才是真正感到困惑的人，因为我相对来说不觉得自己有多少做个“好家庭主妇”的愧疚感。

source: American mainstream media coverage of the Benghazi terrorist attack is a scandal in its own right . The " fourth estate " is supposedly an additional check on the powers of the federal government . Yet in this case , when four Americans -- including an ambassador -- lost their lives , most of the media have shamefully abdicated responsibility .

source: Conservative pundit David Brooks laughed out loud at the suggestion , calling her a " joke " . Her former running mate John McCain called her " irrelevant . " Others point to 2008 wannabes Mitt Romney and Mike Huckabee as more qualified and doing better in polls than Palin when people talk about GOP Presidential hopefuls . Of course , most thought that quitting her day job as Alaska Governor was the death knell for her political career , but I think this is just the beginning of Palin 's national political career . After all , she was just on Oprah !
domestication: 保守派评论家大卫·布鲁克斯一听就哈哈大笑，把她称作是“笑话”。她的前竞选伙伴约翰·麦凯恩称她“无关紧要”。还有人指出，08年总统大选的候选人米特·罗姆尼和迈克·哈克比比帕林更有资格，而且民意调查中他们的表现也比她好。当然，大多数人认为她辞去阿拉斯加州长职务就是她从政生涯的末日，但是我觉得这只是她全国性从政生涯的开始。毕竟，她刚刚上过奥普拉的节目啊！

source: I 've been doing a lot of work recently with a Javascript framework called Ember.js . In production , it asks the user to load a single Javascript file up front , and then runs the whole application in the browser . With a medium-sized or bigger project , you need some kind of build toolchain to take the many smallish code files you 're working on and bundle them up , both for production and also on an ad-hoc basis as you 're working . The toolchain I 'm using is called rake-pipeline ( rakep for short ) which is just some sugar layered over rake which is really just ruby scripting .
domestication: 最近我一直在用一个叫Ember.js的Javascript框架做项目。在生产环境中，它会要求用户先加载一个Javascript文件，然后整个应用就跑在浏览器里了。对于中等规模或更大的项目，你需要有一种构建工具链来把你正在编辑的许多小代码文件打包起来，不仅是在生产环境中，也是在你正在工作时临时使用。 我正在用的工具链叫rake-pipeline（简称rakep），这其实就是在rake上加了一层糖衣，而rake就是ruby脚本。这么说吧，就像在火车上加了个装饰性的车厢一样。

source: The only politicians on Capitol Hill engaged in a genuine effort toward health care reform are those in favor of the SINGLE-PAYER PLAN . Everyone else is just paying lip service to placate the folk who voted them into office -- the majority of whom favor a public option , with a majority of these favoring a single-payer plan .
domestication: 在国会山，只有那些真正支持单一支付者计划的政客们才是在认真努力地推动医疗改革。其他人只是嘴巴上说说而已，就是想应付一下选民，敷衍了事。因为大部分选民都支持公费医疗，而其中的大多数又是支持单一支付者计划的。这就像那句老话说的，真正为你办事的只有那几个真心对你好的，而其他人都是虚情假意。

source: I live in a small east coast city , one of the murder capitals . The kind of place where people have easy friendships across racial or cultural lines based on common interests but there is a lot of racist violence if you are a stranger to them . The city has crumbling infrastructure , failed police force , worst schools in the state , falling population . It 's majority black , minority Hispanic , white and Asian in the single digits . During elections , things can heat up and higher ups tend to stoke jealousies between groups , who never know that the people pretending to be enemies work together just fine on their own level . I know this from experience running for local office years ago and generally being around the fringes . At one time five people were running for mayor in a non-partisan elections and every one of them was a good friend of mine .
domestication: 我住在东海岸一个小城市，这里是谋杀案的高发地。这种地方的人很容易因为共同的兴趣爱好而与不同种族或文化背景的人交朋友，但是如果你是个陌生人，可能会遇到种族暴力。这座城市的基础设施已经破败不堪，警察队伍也形同虚设，学校是全州最糟糕的，人口也在不断减少。这里以黑人为主，西班牙裔和白人、亚裔则寥寥可数。当选举来了，气氛就会变得很激烈，领导们往往会煽动各个群体之间的嫉妒之情，可是那些互相对立的群体并不知道，他们的“敌人”私下里其实相处得很融洽。我通过多年来参加地方选举以及在圈子边缘的经历得出了这个结论。有一次，五个人竞选市长，在那次无党派选举中，每个人都是我的好朋友。
foreignization: 我住在一个小的东海岸城市，这里是凶杀案发生最频繁的城市之一。这种地方的人们基于共同的兴趣很容易跨越种族或文化界限交朋友，但是如果你是他们的陌生人，种族主义暴力非常普遍。 这座城市的基础设施正在崩溃，警察部队失去了作用，是全州最差的学校，人口也在减少。这是一个以黑人为主、西班牙裔为少数、白人和亚裔占比个位数的城市。在选举期间，局势可能会变得紧张，高层人物往往会激起群体之间的嫉妒，而这些群体不知道那些假装成敌人的人们实际上在自己的层面上相处得很好。我知道这件事是因为我曾经竞选过地方官员，并且通常在边缘区域活动。有一次，五个人参加了非党派的市长选举，每一个人都是我的好朋友。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

I live in a small east coast city , one of the murder capitals . The kind of place where people have easy friendships across racial or cultural lines based on common interests but there is a lot of racist violence if you are a stranger to them . The city has crumbling infrastructure , failed police force , worst schools in the state , falling population . It 's majority black , minority Hispanic , white and Asian in the single digits . During elections , things can heat up and higher ups tend to stoke jealousies between groups , who never know that the people pretending to be enemies work together just fine on their own level . I know this from experience running for local office years ago and generally being around the fringes . At one time five people were running for mayor in a non-partisan elections and every one of them was a good friend of mine .

Translate the following text to Chinese.

I live in a small east coast city , one of the murder capitals . The kind of place where people have easy friendships across racial or cultural lines based on common interests but there is a lot of racist violence if you are a stranger to them . The city has crumbling infrastructure , failed police force , worst schools in the state , falling population . It 's majority black , minority Hispanic , white and Asian in the single digits . During elections , things can heat up and higher ups tend to stoke jealousies between groups , who never know that the people pretending to be enemies work together just fine on their own level . I know this from experience running for local office years ago and generally being around the fringes . At one time five people were running for mayor in a non-partisan elections and every one of them was a good friend of mine .

我住在一个小的东海岸城市，这里是凶杀案发生最频繁的城市之一。这种地方的人们基于共同的兴趣很容易跨越种族或文化界限交朋友，但是如果你是他们的陌生人，种族主义暴力非常普遍。 这座城市的基础设施正在崩溃，警察部队失去了作用，是全州最差的学校，人口也在减少。这是一个以黑人为主、西班牙裔为少数、白人和亚裔占比个位数的城市。在选举期间，局势可能会变得紧张，高层人物往往会激起群体之间的嫉妒，而这些群体不知道那些假装成敌人的人们实际上在自己的层面上相处得很好。我知道这件事是因为我曾经竞选过地方官员，并且通常在边缘区域活动。有一次，五个人参加了非党派的市长选举，每一个人都是我的好朋友。

source: I 'll step in here , if you do n't mind . I 'm a vegetarian , and I hope others support my right to make that choice . I fully recognize that my choice is n't completely based on science . I do n't think I have a right to make other people pay more for meat or take away other people 's choices . I have a HUGE problem with extremist groups that want to force everyone else to be vegan .

source: We chose this road of adoption -which was a big step for both of us a step of faith and some private , personal growth steps as well - for very unique reasons for both of us . But even after choosing this and obeying the Holy Spirit 's prompting in this area of adoption and orphan care , we put our own human parameters on the kind of orphan that we thought God would choose for our family . We both felt very strongly about a boy . ( I have the most tender spot in my heart for boys . I always wanted a son , and the thought of having two just excited me to no end ! Not that this diminishes my love for my Cadi at all . ) We also decided , without honestly much prayer , that God had a healthy infant boy for us . We knew any international adoption was risky , adoption in general is challenging and even hard , and we surely knew that God would not require more from us .
domestication: 我们选择了领养这条路，这对我们俩来说都是一步沉重的信仰和个人成长的步伐。但即使在选择了这条路并且听从圣灵在领养和孤儿关怀方面的引导后，我们还是给自己设定了很多人为的限制和条件，认为上帝会为我们的家庭选择什么样的孤儿。我们俩都非常渴望有一个儿子。（我一直特别喜欢男孩，想要一个儿子，想到能有两个儿子简直让我高兴极了！当然，这并不减少我对女儿Cadi的爱。）我们也决定，没经过多少祷告，就认为上帝会给我们一个健康的男婴。我们知道，国际领养有风险，一般的领养也充满挑战，甚至很难，我们相信上帝不会要求我们承担过多的责任。

source: It certainly looks as if there are large electical currents in space . It would be hard to argue that ribbons and sections of magnetic fields can move around like that without electric currents being involved . Are we allowed to talk about that possiblity by the keepers of the keys ? Given the sparseness of the physical environment it rather supports the idea of non-particle electrical flow ( plasmons , not electrons ) , meaning electric currents are waves in a medium , not particles travelling through emptiness .
domestication: 看起来，太空中确实存在着大量的电流。这很难让人反驳这样一种观点：带状和磁场的某些部分可以像那样移动而不涉及电流。那么，我们是否被允许讨论这种可能性呢？鉴于物理环境的稀疏，这种情况更支持非粒子电流（等离子体，而不是电子）的想法，也就是说电流是介质中的波，而不是粒子通过空虚。这种现象让人不得不思考，我们对宇宙的理解还存在哪些盲点。
foreignization: 它看起来确实好像在太空中存在着大型电流。很难反驳这样一种论点，即丝带和磁场的部分不能像那样在没有电流参与的情况下移动。关键的保管者是否允许我们讨论这种可能性？鉴于物理环境的稀疏性，它相当支持非粒子电流（等离子体，而不是电子）的想法，这意味着电流是介质中的波，而不是粒子通过空虚。

source: While the family of freshwater cichlids is massive , and encompasses over 1000 species of fish , African cichlids in particular are becoming increasingly popular with aquarium owners and fish enthusiasts . African cichlids come from only three lakes on the continent ; Lake Malawi , Lake Tanganika , and Lake Victoria . These fish are known for their striking and beautiful colors and patterns , which are not typical to other species of freshwater fish . These fish are known for being highly intelligent and uncommonly social . Although they are hardy fish that tend to be easily maintained , there are still a few aspects and tips to keep in mind when adopting an African Cichlid .

source: The research showed an association between people who waited to have sex and higher satisfaction levels in adulthood romantic relationships , even after factoring in genetic and environmental factors , education level , income , religion , and physical attractiveness . But Harden said that more research is needed to determine what exactly drives an association between waiting to have sex and satisfaction in later relationships .

该研究发现，在成年人的浪漫关系中，晚交往的人与更高的满意度水平之间存在关联，即使考虑了遗传和环境因素、教育水平、收入、宗教和身体吸引力等因素之后也是如此。但是哈登说，需要更多的研究来确定晚交往和以后关系满意度之间的关联的驱动因素是什么。

source: The second reason why I appreciate the above-quoted contribution of Cantillon is that it provides us with a very useful analytical device for examining the unprecedented cheap ( for certain few ) money bonanza of our days and for evaluating the economic , social and political implications this monetary relaxation is likely to have over the medium-to-long term . Thus while we are no longer environed by a monetary system based on precious metals such as gold and silver , therefore not expecting an increase in the money supply by the discovery of more mines or the more efficient exploitation of the existing ones ; we may still apply the " Cantillon effect " to central banking and the way all monetary expansions occur , each affecting different classes of people unequally and disproportionately .
domestication: 第二，我珍视坎蒂隆上述贡献的原因是，它为我们提供了一个很有用的分析工具来审视当今（少数人享有的）前所未有的廉价钱财盛宴，以及评估这种货币宽松政策在中到长期内可能产生的经济、社会和政治影响。因此，尽管我们不再被基于黄金和白银等贵重金属的货币体系所左右，因此不会期望通过发现更多矿藏或更有效地利用现有矿藏来增加货币供应量，但我们仍然可以将“坎蒂隆效应”应用于中央银行和所有货币扩张的发生方式，每种方式都会对不同阶层的人产生不均衡和不成比例的影响。这样一来，我们就可以更好地理解货币政策如何影响不同的群体，从而更好地应对其带来的挑战。
foreignization: 我欣赏以上引用坎蒂隆贡献的第二个原因是，它为我们提供了一个非常有用的分析工具，用于检查我们这个时代前所未有的廉价（对于某些人来说）的货币繁荣，并评估这种货币宽松在中长期内可能产生的经济、社会和政治影响。因此，虽然我们不再被基于黄金和白银等贵重金属的货币体系所包围，因此我们不会期待通过发现更多矿山或更有效地利用现有矿山来增加货币供应；我们仍然可以将“坎蒂隆效应”应用于中央银行和所有货币扩张的发生方式，每种方式都会对不同阶层的人们产生不均衡和不成比例的影响。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

The second reason why I appreciate the above-quoted contribution of Cantillon is that it provides us with a very useful analytical device for examining the unprecedented cheap ( for certain few ) money bonanza of our days and for evaluating the economic , social and political implications this monetary relaxation is likely to have over the medium-to-long term . Thus while we are no longer environed by a monetary system based on precious metals such as gold and silver , therefore not expecting an increase in the money supply by the discovery of more mines or the more efficient exploitation of the existing ones ; we may still apply the " Cantillon effect " to central banking and the way all monetary expansions occur , each affecting different classes of people unequally and disproportionately .

Thus while we are no longer environed by a monetary system based on precious metals such as gold and silver , therefore not expecting an increase in the money supply by the discovery of more mines or the more efficient exploitation of the existing ones ; we may still apply the " Cantillon effect " to central banking and the way all monetary expansions occur , each affecting different classes of people unequally and disproportionately .

source: As the use of Bute and Lasix became more prominent , statistical reports regarding size of fields , breakdowns , and form reversals increased , but proved inconclusive . Three major reports by the Veterinary-Chemist Advisory Committee to the racing organization NASRC ( National Association of State Racing Commissioners ) and the California and Colorado racing boards all came to the conclusion that a controlled medication program does not affect the normal breakdown rate of horses . In 1976 , the California board received the approval of the American Humane Society .
domestication: 但当布托啡诺和拉西克的使用变得更加普遍时，人们开始注意到一些问题。关于比赛马匹数量、受伤率和成绩逆转的统计报告也逐渐增多，但这些报告的结果并不明确。美国国家赛马委员会（NASRC）和加利福尼亚、科罗拉多州赛马管理局的兽医化学顾问委员会先后出具了三份重要报告，都得出一个结论：在赛前给马匹使用药物并不影响马匹正常的受伤率。1976年，加利福尼亚州赛马管理局甚至获得了美国人道协会的批准。
foreignization: 随着布洛芬和Lasix的使用变得更加突出，关于比赛场地规模、故障和形式逆转的统计报告增加，但被证明是无结论的。国家州赛马委员会（NASRC）和加利福尼亚州及科罗拉多州赛马管理机构的兽医-化学顾问委员会发布的三份主要报告都得出这样的结论：受控药物计划不会影响马匹的正常故障率。 1976年，加州赛马管理委员会获得了美国人道协会的批准。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

As the use of Bute and Lasix became more prominent , statistical reports regarding size of fields , breakdowns , and form reversals increased , but proved inconclusive . Three major reports by the Veterinary-Chemist Advisory Committee to the racing organization NASRC ( National Association of State Racing Commissioners ) and the California and Colorado racing boards all came to the conclusion that a controlled medication program does not affect the normal breakdown rate of horses . In 1976 , the California board received the approval of the American Humane Society .

source: The latter is as crucial as the diet the Ikarians adhere to . The social structures might turn out to be even more important , says Buettner . The cultural attitude that honors and celebrates old age keeps seniors more engaged in their communities . Studies have shown that the concept of retirement , common in industrialized countries , actually reduces life expectancy . Such " artificial punctuations " in life , as he calls it , deprive retirees unnecessarily of a sense of purpose and meaningful existence .
domestication: 其实，后者和伊卡利亚岛民的饮食习惯一样重要。社会结构可能更加关键，贝特纳说。尊敬和庆祝老年人的文化观念使老年人更深入地参与到社区中。研究表明，工业化国家普遍存在的退休概念实际上会降低人的寿命。贝特纳称之为“人生中的不自然停顿”，这种情况会让退休人员失去目标感和有意义的存在感。因此，老年人就变成了无所事事的人，他们觉得自己已经没有用了，也不再对社会有任何贡献。这种感觉会让人失去活力和动力，于是就容易衰老和生病了。伊卡利亚岛上的老年人则不一样，他们仍然在社区中扮演着重要角色，保持着忙碌的状态，这让他们始终保持着年轻的心态和活力。

source: Well , an asst. debate coach ( high school and college levels ) , the Gish Gallop is a technique -as described - that really only works in one kind of debate format : the " open-ended format " . One in which STYLE is inevitably more prevailing than SUBSTANCE . This format is rarely if ever used in serious debate formats . In these , where SUBSTANCE is intended to trump STYLE , and scoring reflects it , it is actually the force of an argument itself that matters , not how it 's presented . Unfortunately , our media prefer an open-ended format , for various reasons , and it therefore becomes incumbent upon the moderator to direct the debate in a manner that will try and enhance substance . This was not done last night ( or rarely ) .
domestication: 其实啊，一个高中和大学辩论队的副教练，我可以告诉你，吉什伪理术只在一种辩论格式中有效，那就是“开放式辩论”。这种形式下，表现形式往往比实质内容更重要。但是，在正规的辩论中，这种形式很少被采用。在真正的辩论中，实质内容才是最重要的，评分也会体现这一点，在那里，只有论据的力度才是关键，而不是它的表达方式。不幸的是，我们的媒体更喜欢开放式辩论，原因有很多，所以主持人就有责任引导辩论朝着增强实质内容的方向发展。然而昨晚（或者说大多数时候），并没有这样做。
foreignization: 好吧，作为一名辩论队的助教（高中和大学水平），盖什快跑是一种技术——如描述的那样——只在一种辩论形式中真正有效：“开放式格式”。其中风格不可避免地比实质更占主导地位。这种格式很少或从未在严肃的辩论形式中使用。在这些辩论形式中，实质被设计成超越风格，而评分也反映了这一点，重要的是论点的力量，而不是它的表达方式。不幸的是，我们的媒体更喜欢开放式格式，出于各种原因，因此主持人有责任以一种能够增强实质的方式引导辩论。这一点昨晚（或很少）没有做到。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Well , an asst. debate coach ( high school and college levels ) , the Gish Gallop is a technique -as described - that really only works in one kind of debate format : the " open-ended format " . One in which STYLE is inevitably more prevailing than SUBSTANCE . This format is rarely if ever used in serious debate formats . In these , where SUBSTANCE is intended to trump STYLE , and scoring reflects it , it is actually the force of an argument itself that matters , not how it 's presented . Unfortunately , our media prefer an open-ended format , for various reasons , and it therefore becomes incumbent upon the moderator to direct the debate in a manner that will try and enhance substance . This was not done last night ( or rarely ) .

其实啊，一个高中和大学辩论队的副教练，我可以告诉你，吉什伪理术只在一种辩论格式中有效，那就是“开放式辩论”。这种形式下，表现形式往往比实质内容更重要。但是，在正规的辩论中，这种形式很少被采用。在真正的辩论中，实质内容才是最重要的，评分也会体现这一点，在那里，只有论据的力度才是关键，而不是它的表达方式。不幸的是，我们的媒体更喜欢开放式辩论，原因有很多，所以主持人就有责任引导辩论朝着增强实质内容的方向发展。然而昨晚（或者说大多数时候），并没有这样做。

In these , where SUBSTANCE is intended to trump STYLE , and scoring reflects it , it is actually the force of an argument itself that matters , not how it 's presented . source: Shell finally sunk some bits below the Beaufort and Chukchi this summer but due to issues with the containment barge they pulled out of all holes before reaching the hydrocarbon depth . And even though this year had the smallest arctic ice pack recorded since satellite recording began in 1979 , a persistent ' island ' --with an area of a mid sized US state--made up of about 30% ice concentration hung around neighborhood for a long time and shooed Shell off some sites for a while .
domestication: 海尔公司终于在这个夏天开始在波弗特海和楚科奇海进行钻探，但由于防护船的技术问题，他们没能钻到有碳氢化合物的深度就退出了所有的钻井现场。此外，尽管今年北极的冰层是自1979年卫星记录以来最小的，但是一个“岛屿”般的区域——面积相当于美国中等规模州，海面上大约有30%是冰——长期存在于附近，并且让海尔公司暂时放弃了一些钻探点。
foreignization: 壳牌公司终于在这个夏天将一些钻井设备部署到了北极的博福特海和楚科奇海，但是由于围油栏船存在问题，他们在到达含碳氢化合物的深度之前就已经退出了所有钻井现场。而尽管今年的北极冰层面积是自从1979年卫星记录开始以来最小的，但一个由大约30％的冰浓度组成的、与美国中等规模州大小相当的'岛屿'，长时间地停留在该区域，并且暂时将壳牌公司从某些地点赶走。

messages_domestication.content:
Translate the following text to Chinese.

Shell finally sunk some bits below the Beaufort and Chukchi this summer but due to issues with the containment barge they pulled out of all holes before reaching the hydrocarbon depth . And even though this year had the smallest arctic ice pack recorded since satellite recording began in 1979 , a persistent ' island ' --with an area of a mid sized US state--made up of about 30% ice concentration hung around neighborhood for a long time and shooed Shell off some sites for a while .
海尔公司终于在这个夏天开始在波弗特海和楚科奇海进行钻探，但由于防护船的技术问题，他们没能钻到有碳氢化合物的深度就退出了所有的钻井现场。此外，尽管今年北极的冰层是自1979年卫星记录以来最小的，但是一个“岛屿”般的区域——面积相当于美国中等规模州，海面上大约有30%是冰——长期存在于附近，并且让海尔公司暂时放弃了一些钻探点。

壳牌公司终于在这个夏天将一些钻井设备部署到了北极的博福特海和楚科奇海，但是由于围油栏船存在问题，他们在到达含碳氢化合物的深度之前就已经退出了所有钻井现场。而尽管今年的北极冰层面积是自从1979年卫星记录开始以来最小的，但一个由大约30％的冰浓度组成的、与美国中等规模州大小相当的'岛屿'，长时间地停留在该区域，并且暂时将壳牌公司从某些地点赶走。

source: If we accepted that unfair and inhumane treatment by anyone or towards anyone -- including the government -- was inevitable , we 'd still be in the 1700 ? s . Do n't you have any sense of pride in the essence of what it means to be American , with not only the right , but the duty to stand up and speak out against injustices ? Complacency and laziness is the antithesis of the American Dream , and will lead to the rotting of our way of life from the inside out -- a situation many times worse than what anyone else can do to us , but exactly what they wish they could do . domestication: 如果我们接受了不公平和不人道的待遇，无论是来自谁或针对谁——包括政府，我们还停留在18世纪。难道你没有一点作为美国人的自豪感吗？作为美国人，不仅有权利，还有责任站起来，反对不公正的行为。自满和懒惰是美国梦的对立面，它会从内部腐蚀我们的生活方式，这种情况比任何人对我们做的事都糟糕，但这正是他们希望我们做的。但在这种情况下，他们并没有赢——我们自己放弃了。真正的无知不是幸福——它是一条通向毁灭的道路。
